name: mystery-analysis
description: Analyze mystery novels with structured investigation workflows. Supports text import, EPUB extraction via scripts/extract_epub.py, chapter selection, clue analysis, consistency checking, relation graph generation, and automatic Obsidian vault creation for knowledge management.
trigger: Use this skill when users want to analyze mystery novels, detective stories, or narrative text requiring close reading. Triggers include: mentions of 'mystery analysis', 'clue tracking', 'detective story', 'foreshadowing analysis', or requests to analyze narrative text for patterns, anomalies, and consistency.
capabilities: Import and parse mystery text from multiple formats (md, txt, pdf, epub)
Extract readable chapter text from EPUB files with scripts/extract_epub.py before analysis
Segment text into chapters with automatic detection
Perform structured analysis focusing on details, anomalies, foreshadowing, and insights
Check consistency across chapters and detect contradictions
Generate character and entity relation graphs
Create complete Obsidian vault with organized structure
Export investigation notes with double-links and tags
Generate character pages and cross-chapter tracking
Support multi-language content with language preservation
Evidence-based analysis grounded in selected text
workflow: Extract EPUB chapter text with scripts/extract_epub.py when the source is .epub
Run structured clue analysis on extracted text
Create Obsidian vault with organized structure
Export findings with double-links and tags
outputFormats: Obsidian markdown notes with vault structure
